title: Exclusive: BMW Is Discontinuing the iX in the U.S. — Here's What Replaces It
description: BMW has confirmed the iX is being discontinued in the U.S. market as the brand transitions to Neue Klasse EVs starting with the iX3.

summaryHistory.summary: iX allocation exclusively — the Neue Klasse era begins with the iX3 and Gen6 eDrive technology arriving soon.BMWBLOG » Models » BMW i » iX » Exclusive: BMW Is Discontinuing the iX in the U.S. and are transitioning to our upcoming Neue Klasse models, beginning with the BMW iX3, powered by our late...
